title: Amaranthine
description: Harnessing the power of the sun since 2025
body:
# THIS MOD IS UNDERGOING A COMPLETE REWRITE


My first mod for the roleplay/lore server, Memory Lapse! Very similar to Amarite by Winsweep and Amymialee, adding crystal based weaponry.

THIS MOD REQUIRES ACORNLIB

This mod has compatibility with Hollowed's Combat Amnenities, and best played with enchancement.

# Weaponry!
1. Amaranthine Greatsword - 8.5 damage, 1.3 speed
   Texture by Potatanata. (OG in their Gilded Netherite Sword resource pack!)

2. Amaranthine Cleaver - 8 damage, 1.5 speed
   Works as both an axe and a sword, having the efficency of an axe and the sweep of a sword. Can have both enchantment pools.

## Lore Weaponry
1. Chrysaor - 9 damage, 1.3 speed
Upon critting an enemy, impales said entity with the Fractured effect, damaging them over time while spawning particles.

2. Blind Obedience - 8.5 damage, 1.3 speed
Useless.

3. Captain's Cutlass - 7.5 damage, 1.7 speed
Also useless

# Other Items
1. Amaranthine Blocks
   Made with 4 Amaranthine Shards

2. Amaranthine Shard
   Main crafting ingredient

3. Amaranthine Dust
   Made with Amaranthine Shards in a stonecutter

# Cookies!
All obtained by putting a cookie in a stonecutter
1. Chem Cookie

2. Intel Cookie

3. Arc Cookie(s)
Breeze, ArcCM, Inkwell

4. Irradiated Amaranthine Shard
   obtained by right clicking on a raw gold block with an amaranthine shard. Gives the insanity effect.



# FAQ
This mod will not be ported to any other loader. 
This mod will likely not be ported or backported.
